video.title: Can You Guess the Fast Food Chain by Emoji? 🍔🍟🌮 | Ultimate Quiz
video.description:
Think you know your fast food? This emoji challenge will test you! 🍔

From McDonald's classics to tricky regional chains — can you guess all 35 from just emoji clues?

⏱️ 6 seconds per question — react fast!
🏆 Score 30+ and you're a true fast food expert!
📍 35 questions | 4 rounds | 9 minutes

Rounds:
Round 1 — Easy (everyone knows these)
Round 2 — Getting Harder
Round 3 — Expert Level
Round 4 — Final Challenge (only true foodies pass!)

👍 LIKE if you scored more than 25/35!
🔔 SUBSCRIBE for new quizzes every week!
💬 Drop your score below!

#FastFoodQuiz #EmojiQuiz #GuessTheBrand #QuizBlitz #FoodTrivia
